tasks.label: Zip Theme: EventosTri
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $workspace='${workspaceFolder}'; $siteRoot=''; $candidateA=Join-Path $workspace 'eventostri.org'; $candidateB=$workspace; if (Test-Path (Join-Path $candidateA 'eventostri-calendar')) { $siteRoot=$candidateA } elseif (Test-Path (Join-Path $candidateB 'eventostri-calendar')) { $siteRoot=$candidateB } else { throw "Theme folder not found under: $workspace" }; $themeDir=Join-Path $siteRoot 'eventostri-calendar'; $distDir=Join-Path $siteRoot 'dist'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $distDir | Out-Null; $zipPath=Join-Path $distDir 'eventostri-calendar.zip'; $oldDistZip=Join-Path $distDir 'tema-deportivo-minimal.zip'; $maxRetries=4; $attempt=0; $success=$false; while (-not $success -and $attempt -lt $maxRetries) { $attempt++; try { if (Test-Path $zipPath) { Remove-Item $zipPath -Force }; if (Test-Path $oldDistZip) { Remove-Item $oldDistZip -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path $themeDir -DestinationPath $zipPath -CompressionLevel Optimal; $success=$true } catch { if ($attempt -lt $maxRetries) { Write-Host "Intento $attempt fallido, reintentando en 3s..."; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 } else { throw } } }; $legacyRootZip=Join-Path $siteRoot 'eventostri-calendar.zip'; $oldLegacyRootZip=Join-Path $siteRoot 'tema-deportivo-minimal.zip'; if (Test-Path $legacyRootZip) { Remove-Item $legacyRootZip -Force }; if (Test-Path $oldLegacyRootZip) { Remove-Item $oldLegacyRootZip -Force }; Write-Host 'Created:' $zipPath; Write-Host 'Removed legacy root zip if present:' $legacyRootZip; Write-Host 'Removed old-named zip artifacts if present:' $oldDistZip 'and' $oldLegacyRootZip
